rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BERNARD M FOSTON SR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEPHANIE CHOICE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/07/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF DANA ANNE IMPERIAL HATHAWAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be called with PES-17-300650. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSE OSTBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/16/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Items 5a(3) or (4) and 5a(5) or (6) of the petition must be answered. Item 8/Attachment 8 has some inconsistencies in the names of the heirs and beneficiaries from those mentioned in the will or listed in the proof of service (not just Carl Bevil): E. Thomas Hall, Jr., is a person named in the will, but E. Thomas Hall was listed in item 8; Jacqueline Shubert is shown as a niece in item 8 but is apparently a grandniece, and notice was mailed to Jacqueline Shuberet. "Niece" is not an age. When did Norma Maniz die? The age of a minor must be set forth. The proof of service filed on 11/18/21 states that the "foregoing" Notice of Petition to Administer Estate was served on the French consul on 11/18/21. The attached Notice showed a hearing date of 11/22/21, which was not at least 15 days after 11/18/21. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 2/7/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JANET NADINE CLUGSTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/31/2022. 1) In a Supplement verified by petitioner please explain the value of the real property. The petition alleges the real property has gross income of $620,000.00, does not state the gross fair market value of the real property, and alleges the total value is $620,000.00. 2) Please file a Duties and Liabilities that includes all the required information. Petitioners phone number must be included. 4) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 1/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
